---
title: Adventures
jupyter: python3
---

## June 2026 --- Green Research Tour of Europe

I have been awarded a travel grant specifically to undertake a low-carbon European research tour (train-only!!), visiting groups with whom I share research interests at a moment that matters; I am finishing my PhD and actively looking to build collaborations. I will be documenting the trip as an open resource for early-career researchers wanting to do something similar and argue to faculties that such travels should be more common and supported at least for the sake of sustainability.

**CLICK ON EACH POINT OF THE MAP BELOW TO SEE PHOTOS AND LOGS.**

*If you are on your phone, landscape mode gives a better result.*

Red = where I currently am, Blue = where I have been so far, Grey = not there yet!

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| column: page
import folium
import gpxpy
import pandas as pd
import base64
import io
from pathlib import Path
from PIL import Image, ImageOps
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.colors as mcolors
import numpy as np

# ── Current location ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
CURRENT_LOCATION = True
CURRENT_LAT      = 52.41635771698177
CURRENT_LON      = 12.970118842802965

def _parse_lines_file(path):
    """Parse a .lines file. Each non-comment line: label | lat1,lon1 | lat2,lon2 [| color=...]"""
    lines_data = []
    for line in path.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines():
        line = line.strip()
        if not line or line.startswith("#"):
            continue
        parts = [p.strip() for p in line.split("|")]
        if len(parts) < 3:
            continue
        label = parts[0]
        lat1, lon1 = map(float, parts[1].split(","))
        lat2, lon2 = map(float, parts[2].split(","))
        color = "#3498db"
        for extra in parts[3:]:
            if extra.startswith("color="):
                color = extra.split("=", 1)[1].strip()
        lines_data.append({"label": label, "from": [lat1, lon1], "to": [lat2, lon2], "color": color})
    return lines_data

# ── Discover all GPX files ────────────────────────────────────────────
gpx_files = sorted(Path("adventures").glob("*.gpx"))

# ── Assign sharp colours via a qualitative colormap ──────────────────
# tab10 gives 10 maximally-distinct vivid colours; fall back to hsv for >10
N = len(gpx_files)
if N <= 10:
    cmap = plt.get_cmap("tab10")
    track_colors = [mcolors.to_hex(cmap(i)) for i in range(N)]
else:
    cmap = plt.get_cmap("hsv")
    track_colors = [mcolors.to_hex(cmap(i / N)) for i in range(N)]

# ── Parse every GPX file ──────────────────────────────────────────────
all_tracks = []
for gpx_path, color in zip(gpx_files, track_colors):
    with open(gpx_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        gpx = gpxpy.parse(f)

    points = []
    for track in gpx.tracks:
        for segment in track.segments:
            for pt in segment.points:
                points.append([pt.latitude, pt.longitude])
    for route in gpx.routes:
        for pt in route.points:
            points.append([pt.latitude, pt.longitude])

    if points:
        # Pretty label: replace hyphens/underscores with spaces, title-case
        label = gpx_path.stem.replace("-", " ").replace("_", " ").title()
        all_tracks.append({"name": label, "points": points, "color": color})

# All GPX coords — used for fit_bounds
all_coords = [pt for t in all_tracks for pt in t["points"]]

# ── Create map ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
m = folium.Map(
    tiles="https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/rastertiles/voyager/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png",
    attr='&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors &copy; CARTO',
    max_zoom=19,
)

# ── Draw each GPX track ───────────────────────────────────────────────
for track in all_tracks:
    folium.PolyLine(
        track["points"],
        color=track["color"],
        weight=4,
        opacity=0.95,
        tooltip=track["name"],
    ).add_to(m)

# ── Draw .lines connections ───────────────────────────────────────────
for lines_path in sorted(Path("adventures").glob("*.lines")):
    for seg in _parse_lines_file(lines_path):
        all_coords.extend([seg["from"], seg["to"]])
        folium.PolyLine(
            [seg["from"], seg["to"]],
            color=seg["color"],
            weight=2,
            opacity=0.85,
            tooltip=seg["label"],
        ).add_to(m)

# ── Photo markers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
photos = pd.read_csv("adventures/photos.csv")

def _encode(fname, max_px=800):
    p = Path("adventures/photos") / fname
    with Image.open(p) as img:
        img = ImageOps.exif_transpose(img)
        img = img.convert("RGB")
        img.thumbnail((max_px, max_px), Image.LANCZOS)
        buf = io.BytesIO()
        img.save(buf, format="JPEG", quality=85)
    return "jpeg", base64.b64encode(buf.getvalue()).decode()

for _, row in photos.iterrows():
    raw_image = str(row["image"]).strip() if pd.notna(row["image"]) else ""
    images    = [s.strip() for s in raw_image.split("+")] if raw_image else []
    captions  = [s.strip() for s in str(row["caption"]).split("+")] if pd.notna(row["caption"]) else []
    desc      = str(row["description"]).strip() if pd.notna(row.get("description")) else ""
    cap0      = captions[0] if captions else ""

    def _double_circle(lat, lon, color, tooltip_html, popup_html, popup_width):
        folium.CircleMarker(
            location=[lat, lon], radius=6,
            color=color, fill=True, fill_color=color, fill_opacity=0.9,
        ).add_to(m)
        folium.CircleMarker(
            location=[lat, lon], radius=14,
            color=color, weight=2, fill=True, fill_color=color, fill_opacity=0,
            popup=folium.Popup(popup_html, max_width=popup_width),
        ).add_to(m)

    all_coords.append([row["lat"], row["lon"]])

    if not images:
        tooltip_html = f'<div style="font-size:13px;"><b>{cap0}</b></div>'
        popup_html   = f"""
        <div style="text-align:center;padding:8px;">
          <span style="font-size:16px;color:#999;font-style:italic;">Unavailable for the moment</span><br>
          <b style="font-size:18px;">{cap0}</b>
          {"<br><span style='font-size:15px;color:#666;'>" + desc + "</span>" if desc else ""}
        </div>"""
        _double_circle(row["lat"], row["lon"], "#95a5a6", tooltip_html, popup_html, 440)
    else:
        mime0, b640_thumb = _encode(images[0], max_px=200)
        mime0, b640       = _encode(images[0], max_px=700)
        tooltip_html = f"""
        <div style="text-align:center;max-width:200px;">
          <img src="data:image/{mime0};base64,{b640_thumb}"
               style="width:180px;border-radius:4px;margin-bottom:4px;"><br>
          <b>{cap0}</b>
        </div>"""

        slides = ""
        for i, fname in enumerate(images):
            mime_i, b64_i = _encode(fname, max_px=500) if i > 0 else (mime0, b640)
            cap_i = captions[i] if i < len(captions) else ""
            slides += f"""
            <div style="text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;">
              <img src="data:image/{mime_i};base64,{b64_i}"
                   style="height:calc(85vh - 160px);width:auto;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:4px;"><br>
              <b style="font-size:16px;">{cap_i}</b>
            </div>"""

        popup_html = f"""
        <div>
          <div style="position:relative;">
            <button onclick="this.nextElementSibling.scrollBy({{left:-320,behavior:'smooth'}})"
                    style="position:absolute;left:0;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);z-index:2;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);border:none;border-radius:50%;width:36px;height:36px;font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.25);">&#8249;</button>
            <div style="display:flex;overflow-x:auto;gap:10px;padding:0 44px 6px;scroll-behavior:smooth;">
              {slides}
            </div>
            <button onclick="this.previousElementSibling.scrollBy({{left:320,behavior:'smooth'}})"
                    style="position:absolute;right:0;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);z-index:2;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);border:none;border-radius:50%;width:36px;height:36px;font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.25);">&#8250;</button>
          </div>
          {"<div style='font-size:15px;color:#444;margin-top:12px;line-height:1.6;'>" + desc + "</div>" if desc else ""}
        </div>"""

        _double_circle(row["lat"], row["lon"], "#5dade2", tooltip_html, popup_html, 440)

# ── Food markers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
food = pd.read_csv("adventures/food.csv")

for _, row in food.iterrows():
    desc = str(row["description"]).strip() if pd.notna(row.get("description")) else ""
    tooltip_html = f"""
    <div style="font-size:13px;max-width:180px;">
      🍽️ <b>{row['name']}</b>
      {"<br><span style='color:#555;'>" + desc + "</span>" if desc else ""}
    </div>"""
    popup_html = f"""
    <div style="max-width:260px;">
      <b style="font-size:14px;">🍽️ {row['name']}</b><br>
      <span style="font-size:12px;color:#555;">{desc}</span>
    </div>"""
    all_coords.append([row["lat"], row["lon"]])
    folium.Marker(
        location=[row["lat"], row["lon"]],
        tooltip=folium.Tooltip(tooltip_html, max_width=200),
        popup=folium.Popup(popup_html, max_width=280),
        icon=folium.Icon(icon="cutlery", prefix="fa", color="red"),
    ).add_to(m)

# ── Stay markers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
stays = pd.read_csv("adventures/stays.csv")

for _, row in stays.iterrows():
    desc = str(row["description"]).strip() if pd.notna(row.get("description")) else ""
    tooltip_html = f"""
    <div style="font-size:13px;max-width:180px;">
      🛏️ <b>{row['name']}</b>
      {"<br><span style='color:#555;'>" + desc + "</span>" if desc else ""}
    </div>"""
    popup_html = f"""
    <div style="max-width:260px;">
      <b style="font-size:14px;">🛏️ {row['name']}</b><br>
      <span style="font-size:12px;color:#555;">{desc}</span>
    </div>"""
    all_coords.append([row["lat"], row["lon"]])
    folium.Marker(
        location=[row["lat"], row["lon"]],
        tooltip=folium.Tooltip(tooltip_html, max_width=200),
        popup=folium.Popup(popup_html, max_width=280),
        icon=folium.Icon(icon="bed", prefix="fa", color="purple"),
    ).add_to(m)

# ── Currently here marker ─────────────────────────────────────────────
if CURRENT_LOCATION:
    folium.CircleMarker(
        location=[CURRENT_LAT, CURRENT_LON],
        radius=20, color="#e74c3c", weight=4, fill=False,
        tooltip="Currently here",
    ).add_to(m)

# ── Auto-zoom to fit all landmarks ────────────────────────────────────
lats = [c[0] for c in all_coords]
lons = [c[1] for c in all_coords]
m.fit_bounds([[min(lats), min(lons)], [max(lats), max(lons)]], padding=(20, 20))

# ── Full-screen modal for popups ──────────────────────────────────────
map_var = m.get_name()
m.get_root().html.add_child(folium.Element(f"""
<script>
(function wait() {{
  if (typeof {map_var} === 'undefined') {{ setTimeout(wait, 50); return; }}

  var pd = window.parent.document;

  // Inject modal into the outer Quarto page once
  if (!pd.getElementById('mm')) {{
    var s = pd.createElement('style');
    s.textContent = [
      '#mm{{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);z-index:9999;align-items:center;justify-content:center}}',
      '#mm.open{{display:flex}}',
      '#mm-box{{background:#fff;border-radius:12px;width:85vw;height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;padding:44px 24px 24px;position:relative;box-sizing:border-box}}',
      '#mm-close{{position:absolute;top:10px;right:14px;background:none;border:none;font-size:24px;cursor:pointer;color:#555;line-height:1}}'
    ].join('');
    pd.head.appendChild(s);

    var d = pd.createElement('div');
    d.id = 'mm';
    d.innerHTML = '<div id="mm-box"><button id="mm-close">&#x2715;</button><div id="mm-body"></div></div>';
    pd.body.appendChild(d);

    pd.getElementById('mm-close').addEventListener('click', function() {{
      pd.getElementById('mm').classList.remove('open');
    }});
    pd.getElementById('mm').addEventListener('click', function(e) {{
      if (e.target === this) this.classList.remove('open');
    }});
  }}

  {map_var}.eachLayer(function(layer) {{
    if (layer.getPopup && layer.getPopup()) {{
      layer.getPopup().options.autoPan = false;
    }}
  }});

  {map_var}.on('popupopen', function(e) {{
    var scrollY = window.parent.scrollY;
    var content = e.popup.getContent();
    {map_var}.closePopup();
    var body = pd.getElementById('mm-body');
    if (typeof content === 'string') {{
      body.innerHTML = content;
    }} else {{
      body.innerHTML = '';
      body.appendChild(content.cloneNode(true));
    }}
    pd.getElementById('mm').classList.add('open');
    window.parent.scrollTo(0, scrollY);
  }});
}})();
</script>
"""))

m
```


*With thanks to...*

*... my main sponsor: Wolfson College, University of Cambridge.*

*... my hosts who helped me organise each venue; David Wands, Eemeli Tömberg, Christophe Ringeval, Matteo Braglia, Giovanni Marozzi, Amelia Drew, Matthew Elley, George Zahariade, Maxence Corman, Angelo Caravano.*

*... those, in addition to my hosts, for the discussions and for making my stays very enjoyable; Luiz Felipe Demetrio, Parth Bhargava, Baptiste Blachier, Chiara Animali, Pierre Bechaz.*

*... and their institutions for welcoming me and ---in most cases--- providing additional funding for my stays: Institute of Cosmology and Gravitation (Portsmouth), Université catholique de Louvain, CERN Theory Department (Geneva), University of Pisa, ICTP Trieste, FZU (Prague), Institute of Theoretical Physics of the Jagiellonian University (Kraków), Albert Einstein Institute — Max Planck Institute for Gravitational Physics (Potsdam), University of Amsterdam.*

*... those who volunteered to help; Miguel Bezarès, Sébastien Renaux-Pétel, Cristiano Germani, Juan Garcia-Bellido, Antonio Riotto, Syksy Räsänen, Panagiotis Giannadakis, Nadine Nussbaumer, Aishwaryaa Annamalai...*
